restricted_access_note.value: PDF body is restricted from public viewing on legacy.recorder.maricopa.gov. Maricopa Recorder indexes death certificates by name but does not expose the body image to the public.

moat_note: Recorded the same day as 20260141249 (death certificate of Robert Francis Silva, her spouse and co-trustee of THE SILVA FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST). Consecutive recording numbers (…249 then …250) suggest single-batch filing. Together with 20260141249, marks the simultaneous death of both trustees that triggered the successor-trustee succession on Lot 224 Shamrock Estates Phase 2A.
